changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO quant_metrics (id, risk_model_id, name, description, ordinal, created_by_id, updated_by_id) VALUES (101, 101, 'Data Exfiltration', 'The unauthorized copying, transfer or retrieval of data from a computer or server.', 1, 161, 161) , (102, 101, 'Business Interruption', 'When a process that generates revenue is interrupted. Usually due to a denial of service (DOS) attack.', 2, 161, 161) , (103, 101, 'Regulatory Loss', 'Penalties levied against organizations for noncompliance with data security measures.', 3, 161, 161) , (104, 101, 'Vendor Exposure', 'Cyber exposures due to 3rd parties.', 4, 161, 161) , (105, 101, 'Cyber Insurance Needs', 'Amount of insurance needed to transfer risk against a cybergeddon scenario.', 5, 161, 161) , (106, 101, 'M&A Exposure', 'Amount of exposure of target assets.', 6, 161, 161) , (107, 101, 'Actuarial Analysis', 'Pricing for cyber insurance based on digital asset values.', 7, 161, 161) , (108, 101, 'Cyber Steward Discount', 'Insurance discounts based on security assessments.', 8, 161, 161) , (109, 101, 'Risk Accumulation Exposure', 'Portfolio of risk exposures based on scenario analysis.', 9, 161, 161) , (110, 101, 'Total Exposure', 'Summary of all exposure types.', 10, 161, 161) ;
ALTER SEQUENCE quant_metrics_id_seq RESTART WITH 111;
